title: Pin groups to top of boards
excerpt: It seems like an obvious feature, but there is no way to pin a group to the top of a board.  It would be extremely helpful for pinning groups that may act as templates, FAQs, resources etc. for a board.

posts.author: ceeps (Colin)
posts.cookedHtml: It seems like an obvious feature, but there is no way to pin a group to the top of a board. It would be extremely helpful for pinning groups that may act as templates, FAQs, resources etc. for a board.
